generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmission, ObjectTracksTransmission
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateTransmission, ProjectedPathTransmission
]

instance LiDARPointCloudTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance ProjectedPathTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Framework, ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Framework, DataMonitoringUIEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from LiDAR point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Framework, DataMonitoringUIEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedPathTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Framework, DataMonitoringUIEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ROS2Framework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringUIEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UI component for data monitoring including 3D visualization and control panel"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateData, ProjectedDrivingPathData, ObjectTracksData
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component for ACC computation offloading tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateData, ObjectTracksData
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote management operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateData
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path via UI for operators"
    DTDFVocab:provides ViewVehicleState, ViewProjectedPath, ViewObjectTracks, SaveVehicleData, GenerateReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC computation tasks including lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides DetermineLeadVehicle, ComputeDesiredSpeed, SendActuationCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling remote ACC control and emergency commands for operators, and data collection for developers"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, SendEmergencyBrake, DataCollectionForTroubleshooting
]

instance ViewVehicleState : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data for monitoring purposes"
]

instance ViewProjectedPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving path for operator awareness"
]

instance ViewObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of detected object tracks from sensor data"
]

instance SaveVehicleData : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save vehicle state and sensor data for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate reports from collected vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DetermineLeadVehicle : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Identify lead vehicle in the path for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComputeDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calculate desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SendActuationCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send commands for vehicle actuation (e.g., throttle, brake)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC functionality remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC functionality remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SendEmergencyBrake : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataCollectionForTroubleshooting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Collect vehicle data for developer troubleshooting during development"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity deployed on vehicle hardware for automotive functionality"
    base:contains LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor, PointCloudClusteringTracking, DataTranslation
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity deployed on server hardware for computation offloading"
    base:contains ROS2Framework, DataMonitoringUIEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User entity deployed on operator hardware for monitoring and control"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for clustering and tracking objects from LiDAR point cloud data"
]

instance DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for data serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time vehicle data"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel component for remote management operations"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for adaptive cruise control (ACC), motor actuation, and steering operations are processed by the Controlling FE and Data Translation component, which serializes data and aligns message types. Communication occurs via ROS2 for internal software components and Wi-Fi UDP for inter-entity communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices, as mandated by safety-critical vehicular standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this threshold. This ensures temporal consistency across physical and digital components for real-time operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) is deployed on separate hardware, and the Physical Twin Entity's role extends beyond the standard's OME to include resource-specific functions like sensor data processing. Coordination between entities is managed through ROS2 node communication within the vehicle's distributed system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication is conducted over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer protocol. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliant with ISO 23247 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) implement specific tasks, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as a protocol for data collection and device control interoperability."
]
